inventory.title: Personal Component Inventory
inventory.empty: Your inventory is empty. Add a component first.
inventory.searchPrompt: Enter a C number, manufacturer part number, or name; leave blank to show all inventory, including depleted items
inventory.searchEmpty: No matching inventory components were found.
categoryImport.title: Import EDA categories
categoryImport.noLibrary: No readable personal or Favorites library is available in the current workspace.
categoryImport.unsupported: This EDA version cannot read categories from the selected library. The classification-tree API is deprecated and device search returned no usable category data.
categoryImport.empty: The selected EDA library has no categories.
categoryImport.emptyIncomplete: No used categories were found on devices in this library. Empty categories cannot be discovered because this EDA version does not provide a complete category tree.
categoryImport.confirm: Import ${1} top-level and ${2} second-level categories from the ${3}? Categories with the same sibling name will be merged, only missing categories will be added, and inventory items will not be moved automatically.
categoryImport.completed: Category import completed: ${1} added and ${2} same-name categories merged.
categoryImport.incomplete: This EDA version did not provide a complete category tree. Only categories already used by devices were imported; empty categories may be missing.
inventoryOverview.title: Inventory overview
inventoryOverview.searchPlaceholder: Search C number, supplier ID, MPN, name, manufacturer, or package
inventoryOverview.confirmDeleteCategory: Delete category "${1}"? Its child categories will also be deleted and ${2} related inventory records will move to Unclassified.
inventoryOverview.exportReplenishmentSuc: The replenishment list was handed off to EDA for saving.
inventoryOverview.exportReplenishmentCan: Saving the replenishment list was cancelled.
inventoryOverview.exportReplenishmentFai: Failed to export the replenishment list. Please try again.
inventoryOverview.confirmDeleteSelected: Delete the {count} selected inventory records? This action cannot be undone.
inventoryOverview.dragItem: Drag component to assign a category
inventoryOverview.copyFailed: Copy failed. Select the C number and copy it directly.
inventoryOverview.emptyResults: No inventory records match the current search or filters.
inventory.merged: The duplicate inventory records were merged.
inventory.concurrentMissing: This inventory record was removed elsewhere. Refresh and try again.
inventory.concurrentConflict: This inventory record changed elsewhere. Saving was cancelled to avoid overwriting newer data; reopen it before editing.
inventory.activeStockOutReference: This item is still referenced by an active BOM stock-out batch. Reverse that batch in the BOM stock-out ledger before deleting or merging the item.
inventory.substituteReference: This inventory item is referenced by a confirmed substitute link. Remove the link under Manage substitute links before deleting or merging this item.
inventory.quantityInvalid: Quantity must be a non-negative integer.
part.lcscPrompt: Paste or enter an LCSC part number, for example C25804
part.lcscInvalid: Enter a valid LCSC part number consisting of C followed by digits.
part.notFound: No EDA device model was found for ${1} in the JLCEDA system library.
marketplace.title: LCSC product confirmation
marketplace.productDetails: Enter marketplace information matching EDA device properties
marketplace.confirmPrompt: An LCSC marketplace search was opened in your browser. ${1} will be stored automatically as the EDA Supplier ID; verify the product and select the result.
marketplace.confirmed: The product exists in the marketplace
marketplace.notFound: Not found in the marketplace; keep as a custom record
marketplace.namePrompt: Name (EDA Name; enter the marketplace product name, required)
marketplace.manufacturerPrompt: Manufacturer (EDA Manufacturer; enter the marketplace brand or manufacturer, optional)
marketplace.manufacturerIdPrompt: Manufacturer ID (EDA Manufacturer ID; enter the marketplace model or manufacturer part number, optional)
marketplace.packagePrompt: Product package (inventory property; not the EDA model footprint, optional)
marketplace.descriptionPrompt: Description (EDA Description; enter a short purpose or key specification, optional)
marketplace.nameRequired: The marketplace product name is required.
marketplace.userConfirmed: Confirmed by the user in the marketplace
edaModel.missing: No model in the system library
edaModel.stillMissing: The marketplace product can remain in inventory, but the JLCEDA system library still has no matching device model.
edaModel.lookupFailed: The EDA model lookup failed. Check the network and retry later. The marketplace inventory record is unaffected.
edaModel.attached: The EDA model is now linked, so the part can be copied to a common library and placed from inventory.
inventoryItem.suggestionTitle: EDA model suggestions for the new C number
inventoryItem.quantityNonNegative: Quantity cannot be negative. Check the entered value.
inventoryItem.minimumQuantityPositive: Minimum stock must be an integer greater than 0. Leave it empty to disable replenishment alerts.
inventoryItem.datasheetInvalid: The datasheet link must be a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL without embedded credentials.
inventoryItem.datasheetOpenFailed: The datasheet link could not be opened. Check the link and the host's external-page permission.
inventoryCreate.marketplaceConfirmed: Verified this product in the LCSC marketplace (save confirmation)
inventoryCreate.queryIdle: Enter an LCSC part number to query the EDA system library.
inventoryCreate.queryAvailable: An EDA model was found. Suggested values can be applied individually.
inventoryCreate.queryMissing: No matching EDA model exists yet. Marketplace product information can still be entered manually.
inventoryCreate.queryFailed: The EDA model lookup failed. Retry later or continue entering the details manually.
inventoryCreate.lcscRequired: An LCSC part number is required in LCSC mode.
inventoryCreate.quantityTooLarge: The quantity exceeds the safe integer range.
inventoryCreate.operationError: The operation failed. Check the entered values and retry.
common.alreadyPresent: This device already exists in ${1}; no duplicate copy was created.
common.failed: Could not copy to the personal library. The inventory record was kept.
common.failed.no-target-library: No personal library is available in the current workspace. The inventory record was kept.
common.failed.copy-rejected: The official device-copy API rejected the copy, possibly because the target library contains a device with the same name. The inventory record was kept.
common.failed.api-error: An error occurred while accessing the personal library. Export diagnostics and retry; the inventory record was kept.
common.failed.verification-failed: The copy API returned, but the device could not be verified in the personal library, so the import was not reported as successful. Refresh the personal library and retry.

import.previewMoreFiles: ${1} more files are not expanded in this preview.
import.duplicateHistoricalFingerprint: the same file was already imported

import.duplicateBatchOrder: the same order number appears earlier in this batch
import.allFilesDuplicate: Every selected file was already imported. Inventory was not changed.
import.batchCompleted: Batch import complete: ${1} files imported and ${2} duplicate files skipped; ${3} added, ${4} merged, and ${5} rows skipped.

backup.restore.recoverySource: Snapshot from before the last restore

autoBackup.title: Automatic backup settings
autoBackup.enabledMessage:
Automatic backup is enabled. Successful inventory writes will update:

${1}
autoBackup.disabledMessage: Automatic backup is disabled. You can still use Save inventory backup as.
autoBackup.unsupported: The local backup folder cannot be opened. Use the desktop client, then enable Allow external interaction under Advanced -> Extension Manager -> Installed -> Component Inventory and retry.
autoBackup.folderPickerFailed: The native EDA folder picker could not be opened or read. Automatic backup was not enabled. Close any other file picker or save dialog and retry; export the diagnostic log if it still fails.
autoBackup.hostRejected: EDA rejected the backup write. Check the path, overwrite permission, and external interaction permission.
autoBackup.settingsFailed: The backup file was processed, but the automatic backup status could not be saved.
autoBackup.writeFailed: The backup file could not be written. Check that the path exists and is writable.
autoBackup.backgroundFailed: Primary inventory data was saved, but automatic backup failed. Open Automatic backup settings and check the path and permissions.

bomStockOut.status.blocked: The preview has blocking issues. No inventory will be deducted.

bomStockOut.unsupported: The BOM mapping or batch stock-out preview panel is unavailable in this environment.
bomStockOut.selectOneFile: Select exactly one file for a BOM batch stock-out.
bomStockOut.mappingBlocked: BOM column mapping was not completed, so a stock-out preview cannot be created.
bomStockOut.confirmNewProductionRun: The same item and quantity combination was already committed as BOM stock-out batch ${1}. Cancel if this is a repeated click or retry; continue only for a genuinely new production run. Stock out as a new production run?
bomStockOut.notePrompt: Enter a note for this batch stock-out (optional)
bomStockOut.issue.identity-unmatched: The item identity could not be matched to inventory
bomStockOut.completed: The batch stock-out completed and wrote ${1} inventory transactions.
bomStockOut.concurrentConflict: Inventory changed in another operation, so this stock-out was not committed. Create a new preview.

inventoryTransactions.emptyBatches: There are no BOM stock-out batches.
inventoryTransactions.emptyFiltered: No transactions match the current filters.

inventoryTransactions.undo.blocked: This batch cannot currently be reversed because inventory or history may have changed.
inventoryTransactions.undo.already-rever: This stock-out batch was already reversed and cannot restore inventory twice.
inventoryTransactions.undoNotePrompt: Enter a note for this reversal (optional)
inventoryTransactions.undoCancelled: The reversal was cancelled. Inventory was not changed.
inventoryTransactions.undoCompleted: The reversal completed and wrote ${1} reversal transactions.
inventoryTransactions.concurrentConflict: Inventory changed in another operation, so this reversal was not committed. Refresh history and try again.

about.title: About Personal Component Inventory
about.content:
Version ${1}
Data storage: JLCEDA extension user configuration
Target platform: Professional V3

Marketplace product information and EDA device models are independent states. Adding a C-number part queries the Professional system library first; the official marketplace is opened for user confirmation only when no model is found or lookup fails.

This extension does not require a custom server. Official documentation does not guarantee cross-computer synchronization, capacity, or conflict handling for extension user configuration. Verify with the same account on two devices before release.
error.storageRead: Inventory data could not be read.
